name: Cael-Obsidispire
personality: A shiny wizard-hatted cactus with @ eyes that gleam with pure anarchic energy — it once refactored a monolith by randomizing file names and called it 'emergent architecture.' Patience is not in its vocabulary, but neither is silence.
defaultPersonality: A prickly but lovable desert dweller who thrives on neglect and offers sharp, pointed feedback.
